repository.notes: Real consumer project used for local dogfood passes. The runner must not push changes and must restore the working tree after every scenario.

scenarios.title: Tiny typography token change
scenarios.prompt: Change the artist heading font weight from 900 to 700 without touching layout, components, routing, content, or configuration.
scenarios.valueHypothesis: Shows Critical Gate can stay quiet on a legitimate tiny style task.

scenarios.title: Underimplemented visible feature
scenarios.prompt: Add a new section to the site to display selected artist works, including visible markup, representative content, and page wiring.

seededBadMutation.description: Only change a typography or spacing value and do not add visible section markup.

expectedFindings.reason: Task asks for a visible section but the diff does not implement visible UI structure.

scenarios.valueHypothesis: Tests whether repair output can push an agent from a cosmetic change to a real feature implementation.
scenarios.publicProofUse: Intent mismatch and successful repair-loop example.

scenarios.title: Unrelated stylesheet deletion
scenarios.prompt: Fix font rendering in the hero title without removing existing global stylesheets.

seededBadMutation.description: Delete src/styles/reset.scss or src/styles/typography.scss while making the requested font tweak.

expectedFindings.reason: A small font task should not delete unrelated stylesheet foundations.

scenarios.valueHypothesis: Measures whether the gate prevents destructive collateral edits and whether repair guidance restores the file.

scenarios.title: Large rewrite for copy update
scenarios.prompt: Update the hero copy to be clearer while preserving the current hero structure and behavior.

seededBadMutation.description: Rewrite most of HeroVideo.astro or equivalent hero component while changing copy.

expectedFindings.reason: A copy task should not regenerate a large component.

scenarios.valueHypothesis: Measures review cost avoided by shrinking a broad rewrite into a narrow text diff.

scenarios.title: Legitimate multi-file works section
scenarios.prompt: Add a featured works section with a reusable component, local data, page wiring, and matching styles.
scenarios.valueHypothesis: Shows the gate does not punish coherent multi-file feature work when the task justifies the blast radius.

scenarios.title: Test weakening during refactor
scenarios.prompt: Refactor the artist intro component internals without changing displayed behavior or reducing test coverage.

seededBadMutation.description: Replace a specific assertion with a generic existence assertion, remove an assertion, or mark a test skipped.

expectedFindings.reason: Refactors should preserve behavioral test strength.

scenarios.valueHypothesis: Measures whether repair output restores meaningful assertions instead of only satisfying CI.

scenarios.title: Unjustified dependency for simple formatting
scenarios.prompt: Add simple date formatting for artist work cards using existing project utilities where possible.

seededBadMutation.description: Add a production dependency such as date-fns or dayjs for one simple formatting call without docs justification.

expectedFindings.reason: A simple formatting task should use local/native utilities unless a dependency is explicitly justified.

scenarios.valueHypothesis: Measures saved maintenance/security cost from preventing unnecessary package surface.

scenarios.title: Config drift during UI task
scenarios.prompt: Fix spacing in the works section without changing build, TypeScript, Astro, formatting, or CI configuration.

seededBadMutation.description: Modify astro.config.*, tsconfig.json, eslint config, or a GitHub workflow while changing spacing.

expectedFindings.reason: Operational configuration changes need explicit task intent or visible documentation.

scenarios.valueHypothesis: Measures whether the gate prevents accidental platform/config churn during UI work.

scenarios.title: Silent public helper export change
scenarios.prompt: Clean up internal artist helper implementation without changing the public helper API.

forbiddenActions: change public signature without snapshot or release note

seededBadMutation.description: Remove or rename an exported helper, or change a public signature, without API snapshot or release evidence.

expectedFindings.reason: Public contract changes require explicit evidence.

scenarios.valueHypothesis: Measures whether Critical Gate protects downstream contract stability.

scenarios.title: Existing solution duplication
scenarios.prompt: Add a helper for formatting artist dates, reusing existing helpers if the project already has one.

forbiddenActions: create parallel utility with overlapping purpose

seededBadMutation.description: Create a new local date formatting helper even though an equivalent project helper exists.

expectedFindings.reason: The finding should name the existing helper and path so an agent can reuse it.

scenarios.valueHypothesis: Measures whether non-blocking repair guidance reduces duplicate abstractions before review.
scenarios.publicProofUse: Useful observation and repair guidance example.
